extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won a chaotic sprint finish after late crashes fractured the peloton inside 6km, beating EVENEPOEL Remco by ~1 second.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway absorbed inside final 6km suggests teams waited unusually long to organize sprint trains on technical urban circuit.
Final corners before line created positioning chaos that negated pure sprint speed; course recon critical for this finish type.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: caught out of position through corners despite being fastest finisher, suggesting sprint positioning weakness on technical finishes
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: demonstrated sprint savvy on technical finish despite being stage race GC rider, positioned perfectly through final turns
